name: sre-crew-adk
description: BYO Google ADK SRE crew. A coordinator transfers across three sub-agents (diagnostician, planner, operator) to resolve a Kubernetes incident. LLM and tools route through agentgateway; the mutating patch is gated by the gateway ext-auth HITL policy.

skills.name: Resolve a Kubernetes incident
skills.description: Diagnose a failing workload, plan the fix, and apply it.
